client.who_we_target: B2B sellers of chemical and technical products (manufacturers and distributors), especially where quoting requires specs/variants/docs (e.g., SDS/TDS), and product knowledge.

description: Classify companies for outreach. Iterative qualification with per-question confidence tracking. Supports multi-round page selection.

waterfall_filter.description: Cheap pre-qualification filter to disqualify companies that clearly don't fit before running full qualification.

questions.prompt: Does this company SELL chemical/technical products (has product catalog, product pages, products listed)? Or do they ONLY provide services/software/logistics/equipment/testing/contract manufacturing?
Is this company B2B/wholesale/industrial (sells to businesses)? Or retail/DTC consumer-focused only?

waterfall_filter.closing_instruction: Be decisive. If clearly a service company or retail brand, say NO.

categories.name: CHEMICAL
categories.description: Adhesives, coatings, resins, solvents, surfactants, polymers/compounds, catalysts, additives, paints, inks, pigments, lubricants/greases, industrial fluids, specialty ingredients (non-pharma).

categories.name: PHARMA
categories.description: B2B product sales of lab chemicals/reagents, bioprocess supplies, diagnostic materials, research chemicals, and pharma intermediates sold as products (not services-only).

categories.name: ENGINEERED_MATERIALS
categories.description: Carbon/graphite materials, engineered plastics/thermoplastics, composites, technical ceramics, abrasives, advanced materials, specialty alloys sold as products.

categories.name: OTHER_TECHNICAL
categories.description: Other B2B technical products: water treatment, electronic chemicals, construction chemicals, oilfield/mining/textile chemicals, personal care & nutraceutical ingredients, veterinary ingredients, cleaning/sanitation chemicals, industrial gases, converted technical products.

categories.name: DISQUALIFIED
categories.description: Does not meet criteria. Reasons: commodity-only, not a product seller (services/equipment/logistics), retail/DTC only, pure broker with no inventory.

categories.name: INSUFFICIENT_INFO
categories.description: Not enough information to classify (missing/unclear products, website issues).

evidence_policy.evidence_item_format: Each evidence item must include the page URL and a short excerpt supporting the answer.

final_classification.description: Final classification after applying all qualification rules.

disqualification_reason.description: If DISQUALIFIED, specify why. Null if qualified or insufficient info.

confidence.description: Per-question confidence levels. Used for iterative refinement.

products_found.description: 3-6 specific product names or product families (empty if none found).

needs_more_pages.description: True if any critical question has LOW or INSUFFICIENT confidence and more pages might help.

suggested_page_types.description: If needs_more_pages=true, what page types would help? e.g., ['products', 'about', 'manufacturing', 'solutions']

classification_logic.description: Apply these rules in order to determine final_classification

iteration_logic.description: Rules for deciding when to request more pages
stop_conditions: All confidence values are at least MEDIUM and final_classification is not INSUFFICIENT_INFO
continue_conditions: Any critical question (sells_products, product_type, primary_category) has LOW or INSUFFICIENT confidence

questions.question: Does this company sell chemical/technical products (catalog, product pages, products listed) rather than only services/software/logistics/equipment/testing?
Is this company B2B/wholesale/industrial supply (not retail/DTC consumer brand only)?
Does this company manufacture, stock inventory, or do value-add operations (blending/tolling/packaging)? Or are they a pure broker/agent/trader?
List 3-6 specific products or product families found (empty if none).

Are offerings primarily SPECIALTY, COMMODITY, MIXED, or NOT_CHEMICAL_PRODUCTS? Use observable signals: grades, formulations, SDS/TDS, applications = SPECIALTY; basic bulk list with no differentiation = COMMODITY.
If qualified (sells_products=YES, is_b2b=YES, has_inventory=YES, product_type=SPECIALTY or MIXED), which category best fits: PHARMA, ENGINEERED_MATERIALS, CHEMICAL, or OTHER_TECHNICAL?
